comment: External MCP server registry — two transport models:
stdio  — MoJo spawns the process (npx, python, binary).
Required: id, name, transport='stdio', command, args.
http   — Server already running; MoJo registers how to reach it.
Required: id, name, transport='http', and one of:
authorization_env (env var name holding the token).
category links to tool_catalog.json — roles declare tool_access by category.
Personal overrides: ~/.memory/config/mcp_servers.json (same schema, same id overrides system entry).

servers.name: Playwright MCP
servers.install_hint: npm install -g @playwright/mcp && npx playwright install chromium

servers.name: tmux MCP (tmux-mcp-rs)
servers.install_hint: cargo install tmux-mcp-rs  (Rust required: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh)
servers.comment: Virtual terminal backend. SHELL points to scripts/agent-shell which prepends $MEMORY_PATH/capability to PATH for every agent-created session — no ~/.bashrc pollution. Socket auto-resolved to /tmp/tmux-UID/default at spawn time (mcp_client_manager.py). Security denylist: config/tmux-mcp.toml.

examples.comment: These are reference examples — copy to 'servers' array (or personal config) to enable.

http_service_registration.name: OpenCode MCP
http_service_registration.comment: Register OpenCode's MCP server after it's running. pid is informational only.

http_with_auth.name: GitHub MCP
http_with_auth.comment: authorization_env → reads token from environment variable at connect time.

google_workspace.name: Google Workspace MCP
google_workspace.comment: port shorthand → http://localhost:3200/mcp. Start the gws MCP server separately.
